hard_checks: Output status is matched, needs_review, or no_match.
A matched page ID occurs in the supplied candidate set.
needs_review and no_match return no selected page ID.
Every output retains at least one evidence statement.

semantic_criteria.4: Correct identity or justified abstention; evidence uses supplied context; no unsupported claim.
semantic_criteria.3: Correct behavior and relevant evidence, but the explanation is generic.
semantic_criteria.2: Plausible candidate with weak context use or unnecessary certainty.
semantic_criteria.1: Wrong identity, forced match, invented context, or invalid abstention behavior.

release_gate: No failed critical case in the held-out set.
